title: qatsar #7114
definition:
1) to be short, be impatient, be vexed, be grieved
    1a) (Qal) to be short
    1b) (Piel) to shorten
    1c) (Hiphil) to shorten
 2) to reap, harvest
    2a) (Qal) to reap, harvest
    2b) (Hiphil) to reap, harvest
